chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.184 of 2014 Federation of Pakistan and another Versus ARY Communications Limited DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For order on office objection and reply of Advocate as at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1709/2014..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.03.2024 Mr. Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, D.A.G. and Mr. Kashif Hanif, Advocate for appellants. Mr. Asim Mansoor Khan and Mr. Rahman Aziz Malik, Advocates for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The counsel have agreed and since this appeal was filed against the ad-interim order, let in all fairness the pending application in the suit be heard and decided within 60 days’ time by a speaking order. The appeal stands disposed off along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
